title.en: How do England stop Norway - and Haaland?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰如何阻止挪威和哈兰德？

summary.en: As England prepare to face Norway in a World Cup quarter-final on Saturday, how can Thomas Tuchel's side handle the main threat - star striker Erling Haaland?

title.en: Hacking worry for Argentine FA over World Cup emails
title.zh-CN: 通过世界杯电子邮件黑客攻击阿根廷足协的担忧

summary.en: Argentina's football association signals it may have suffered a cyber attack after emails from its accounts reportedly criticised refereeing in the dramatic win against Egypt at the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷足球协会表示，它可能遭受了网络攻击，此前据报道，其账户中的电子邮件批评裁判在世界杯上击败埃及的戏剧性胜利。
